title: [codereview-pass1] spec/02a: Mermaid transition still mixes syntax; make fully declarative pseudocode without 'OR'
description: After edit to replace 'or', the condition_met() wrapper is not pure pseudocode per CCP style in other sections. Should use separate transition arrows or full if-elseif table. Also, cross-ref to draft-lichen-tdma missing in §3. P1 correctness. codereview-tagged. discovered-from:e70b
